title: Argus Partners acts on BazaarNow fundraise
description: Quick-commerce startup BazaarNow has raised ₹75 crore from a fundraise led by Peak XV Partners, with participation from existing investors Whiteboard Capital and Antler, along with angel investors.Argus Partners advised BazaarNow and its Founders on this fundraise.The transaction team consisted of Jitendra Soni (Partner), Sadia Akhter (Senior Associate), Associates Samia Haider and Abhirami Retheev.The Firm also advised existing investors Whiteboard Capital and Antler with a team that consisted
